steps.title: Identify the stated goal
steps.content: The student needs to emphasize the location of Hornsdale Wind Farm.

steps.title: Match goal to choice
steps.content: Choice C makes the location the focal point by placing “Hornsdale, Australia” in the subject position. The other options emphasize capacity (A), define terminology (B), or explain general wind turbine information (D). That matches choice C — C is correct.
